SEARCH

Class Product

java.lang.Object
Product
public class Product extends Object
Product models an inventory item in a shop's inventory. A product has a unique ID, name, price, quantity, and re-order point (when the quantity reaches this point, the item needs to be re-ordered).
Author:
Wendi Jollymore

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Product(String id, String name, double price, int quantity, int reorderPoint)
    Construct's a Product with specific values.

  • Constructor Details

    • Product

      public Product(String id, String name, double price, int quantity, int reorderPoint)
      Construct's a Product with specific values. ID and Name can't be empty strings, price and quantity must be 0 or greater, and re-order point must be greater than 0. Additionally, ID must be 12 characters or less, and product name must be 100 characters or less.
      Parameters:
      id - the programmer-specified product ID number
      name - the programmer-specified product name
      price - the programer-specified price of this product
      quantity - the programmer-specified quantity of this product
      reorderPoint - the programmer-specified re-order point

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Retrieves this product's ID.
      Returns:
      this product's id value

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Places a valid id value into this product's ID member. An ID must be 12 characters or less and can't be an empty string, otherwise an exception is thrown.
      Parameters:
      id - the programmer-specified id value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the id is null/empty or more than 12 characters

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Retrieve's this product's name
      Returns:
      this product's name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Places a valid name string into this product's name member. The name can't be null/empty and must be 100 characters or less, otherwise an exception is thrown.
      Parameters:
      name - the programmer-specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name is null/empty or more than 100 characters

    • getPrice

      public double getPrice()
      Retrieve's this product's price
      Returns:
      this product's price

    • setPrice

      public void setPrice(double price)
      Places a valid value into this product's price member. Price must be 0 or greater, otherwise an exception is thrown.
      Parameters:
      price - the programmer-specified price
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the price is invalid

    • getQuantity

      public int getQuantity()
      Retrieve's this product's quantity (number of items in stock)
      Returns:
      the quantity of this product in inventory

    • setQuantity

      public void setQuantity(int quantity)
      Places a valid integer value into the quantity member. Quantity must be 0 or greater, otherwise an exception is thrown.
      Parameters:
      quantity - the programmer-specified quantity
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the quantity is invalid

    • getReorderPoint

      public int getReorderPoint()
      Retrieves the re-order point of this product, which is the quantity that should trigger re-ordering of this product.
      Returns:
      the re-order point for this product

    • setReorderPoint

      public void setReorderPoint(int reorderPoint)
      Places a valid integer value into the reorderPoint member. Re-order point must be greater than 0, otherwise an exception is thrown.
      Parameters:
      reorderPoint - the programmer-specified re-order poin
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the reorder point is invalid

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Gets a String representation of this product, formatted. This formatted string is in the form: 
      -----id----- --- name (100 columns) --- --q- $---p.pp
      • id is formatted as a left-justfied string within 12 columns
      • name is formatted as a left-justified string within 100 columns
      • quantity is right-justified within 4 columns
      • price is formatted to two decimal places with 4 characters to the right of the decimal point
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      this product as a String
